name: Willow Bark Extract
summary: Willow Bark Extract is tracked for Contains salicin, metabolized to salicylate compounds that affect prostaglandin-mediated pain pathways with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is.
